reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
my booking was mistakenly made on a wrong date(first time with agoda).  i asked if they  Agoda or Hilton can just give me a voucher 9since i paid for it) they refuse....so,so,so the cancelation policy...i felt so disappointed and Hilto is not considerate either- they want me too book a new room in a new(future date) which the price is exorbitantly high!!!!!

hey Agoda customer service, i felt like you did not help me at ALL!!!!!

reviews.title: Bestblocation service. Price
reviews.text: good enough for international traveler that I will come back again

reviews.title: Good location but feels like I was back in 1989
reviews.text: A very typical 'businessman' hotel which seems to have been stuck in the 80's.  The free wifi was only available in the lobby area, not room (unless we were in executive rooms.  Rooms very old and tired looking.  Lucky it was only one night before heading to Halong Bay.  Wake up Hilton, it's 2012, get with the programme.

reviews.title: Run down. Overpriced.
reviews.text: Old hotel. Run down and poorly managed. Stained carpet everywhere. Uncomfortable old bed mattress. No power outlets in the room. The ones available behind the bed are a risk of getting shocked. Short on staff, bad attitude. Hard to believe this is Hilton brand. Defiantly would not recommend staying there.

reviews.title: Old hotel with poor maintenance
reviews.text: This hotel used to be a great one, I guess.  Now it is old and under the poor management.  Old Capet and smelling bed linen.  We stayed only one night and will not recommend any one to this hotel.

reviews.title: Never ever
reviews.text: the hotel is too old and the rooms was smelling. my mom could not sleep because we could not open the windows and the air was smelling like mould. The location is too far from any interesting place. we changed after the first night and moved to a small local hotel witch was perfect for 10% of the Hiltons price. I can't recommend this hotel to anybody, and would not book it again

reviews.title: Business hotel
reviews.text: One-night stay at Hilton and compared to the boutique hotels in Old Quarters, I was disappointed especially with the price I am paying (x3 times of boutique hotel). Old carpet, incredibly slow wifi and chargable high-speed internet connection. The only plus point is that Highlands cafe is beside the hotel.

reviews.title: No lobby service when I have arrived, breakfast was very pathetic not 5 star standards,
reviews.text:
Overall, experience not good 
Need to improve the quality of the food and service

reviews.title: Fixture too old
reviews.text: Non

reviews.title: Expected quality
reviews.text: Admittedly dissappointing as hotel in need of renovation. Stayed there several times over the years but conditions unchanged but for the worse.
reviews.positives: Great breakfast, good staff and Hilton quality

reviews.title: A Hilton? Hardly,...
reviews.text: This hotel is smacked in the middle of Hanoi and is situated in an excellent location. But that is all to is with regards to being 'excellent'. Once you step in the hotel lobby, the hotel seemed to be quite dated. Its worse as you step into the hotel room. It has a very distasteful choice of colour scheme (jade-colored carpet, maroon granite on wall/floor tiles, weird looking curtains covering half-sized windows) and the furniture arrangement is extremely odd and weird (big spaces in the middle and with a relatively small desk on the corner). You can't really make out what is wrong with the room but safe to say it does seem musty (the air just wasn't right either with the A/C smells funny). Bathroom is also very very outdated. I thought i stepped into a room that wasn't changed for the last 20years!!! OMG!!! We're talking about HILTON here!!! Will I come back again? Absolutely not ... this hotel truly embarasses the HILTON brand which prides itself for stylish, forward thinking with innovative concepts!! Totally unbelievable!

reviews.title: This hotel needs an upgrade
reviews.text:
It is a great location.... but the whole hotel needs an upgrade. My expectations were quite high knowing that it’s a Hilton hotel. 

Carpet is smelly. Lifts are slow. 
Breakfast though is good... great spread.

reviews.title: The hotel is overpriced and old old old....
reviews.text: the rooms conditions are miserable and for less price no internet in the standard room unless u pay 16 USD, incredible still like this in 2014

reviews.title: Poor value for money, poor services
reviews.text:
It was one of the most unpleasant stay I ever had at Hilton Opera Hotel.
It is now , probably the only 5-star hotel that charges USD15.0 for wifi services when most 4 to 5 star hotels provide complimentary wifi service to the guests.
Hotel ran out of cash for foreign exchange. I had to ask 4 times waited till late afternoon just to change GBP160.0.
I asked the front desk that I wanted to see the General Manager. the answer was unavailable and had no follow-up.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The building is old, carpet smell musty.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: interior are too old

reviews.title: poor service
reviews.text: poor service. the bell desk never care to help with luggage during check in and check out. so i had to carry it by myself. very poor front desk attitude
reviews.positives: location and restaurant staff very good

reviews.title: OK
reviews.text: it was ok, nothing much to complaint except that Hanoi its self for me is not a clean city at all

reviews.title: Nice hotel but…
reviews.text: Such a great location but it’s seem quite difficult to find especially by grab driver. They could add on basic items like choices of bread.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: No welcom fruits ?  Expensive minibar?

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I had ordered room service for soup. i have made complaint as the soup is too salty and I didn't eat. but no action from Hilton.

reviews.title: No free wifi service?
reviews.text: No free wifi service? That was a little disappointed.

reviews.title: bad experience
reviews.text: No wifi in the room,, no respect customers, , aircond no cold!!

reviews.title: Very old Hotel
reviews.text:
Facility very old.  
Staff very kind and good service.
When I stayed change carpet at corridor, therefore bit dusty.

reviews.title: Hotel was so so, cannot compared to Lotte shoreline which I stayed
reviews.text:
Had stayed Lotte Hanoi for 3 nights and moved to Hilton, a huge difference on staff service and facilities. Lotte staff are more proactive and you can feel passionate while I will rate Hilton as a four star in terms of service and staff, though the location of Hilton is far better. 

The rate of Lotte is slightly higher and sure you pay what you get. Hilton is a hotel ok to stay when you are more keen on location.

reviews.title: In dire need to rennovation
reviews.text: Best location in town. Beautiful lobby but room was very disappointing: tired and worn out

reviews.title: unfriendly receptionist, unprofessional housekeeping
reviews.text:
I heard a lots about Hilton, I believed that Hilton would give us professional service and friendly, warm welcome. But i was disappointed. 
A receptionist named "Diep" (i don't really remember her name) was very unfriendly, she talked to us like her brother, not a client. 
About housekeeping, they knocked the door 1,2 times and go into our room without say a word. That war horrible, they scared us who were still in the room. 
I don't think i recommend Hilton Hanoi to anyone.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: Staff did'nt help. Facilities are quite old. I won't suggest.

reviews.title: Ok but wouldn't stay ahain
reviews.text:
Nondescript stay,  
In general staff were aloof apart from fitness staff who were very approachable & helpful.
I think internet should have been free in rooms.

reviews.title: Comfort stay
reviews.text: No free wifi inside the room

reviews.title: Not so impressed
reviews.text: Not so impressed with the service...
reviews.positives: Location, the bar at the lobby

reviews.title: Hotel needs renovation , room very clean tidy
reviews.text: Staff at the front need to be more professional , favorite taxi drivers , tour operators , recommending restaurants and massage parlors ,that give them a cut should not be the way eg the bell boy arrange a city tour for  two hours   30 US dollars , the taxi dude went 5 kms per hour , the push bicycle riders over took  us   , not good for a reputed company like the hilton

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Nice property at a fair price however the whole place had a musty smell. Particularly in the rooms. There was a notice in the rooms stating that they were upgrading their air handling system and perhaps that will correct the problem. Aside from that a very good hotel.

reviews.title: the room was very old.. not recommend
reviews.positives: the room was very old.. not recommend

reviews.title: quite good
reviews.text: quite good as it very central and easy access to many parts of Hanoi

reviews.title: Uncomfortable room - AC was not work.
reviews.text: Uncomfortable room - the air conditioning was not work.
reviews.positives: Location, close to restaurant, close to shopping center

reviews.title: good location but quite old hotel
reviews.text: good location, quite clean hotel because quite old hotel

reviews.title: good location
reviews.text: Stayed on executive floor with access to the executive lounge all day, which was a plus.  However, breakfast selection in the executive is definitely nothing rave about.  Would have rather eaten in the regular restaurant for breakfast.  Other than breakfast, the executive was a good place to unwind during the afternoon.  Room quiet and comfortable.  Beware:  only free wifi in executive floor rooms, no free wifi on the other floors.  In-house Vietnamese restaurant also ain't nothing to write home about.
reviews.positives: conveniently situated in heart of city

reviews.title: Great Location, but not a 5 star as it should be!
reviews.text: the hotel is large, but the rooms are too old and the furnishings show signs of wear. overall, the price is too high for this hotel. sofitel or the intercontinental would of been a nicer choice.
reviews.positives: Good location, but needs major renovation, looks shaby inside.

reviews.title: very gracious staff but the hotel needs a facelift
reviews.text:
the initial impression is terrific with a cheerful, efficient and very helpful front desk staff.     the television and few channels and terrible reception. the restaurants were booked for event at lunch forcing the overflow into the lobby cocktail lounge for meals.   they gym is old, small and what little equipment it has is old or just odd. 
 
yet even with this litany of complaints, i might go back because the staff was so pleasant and the location good.

reviews.title: not 5 star. ..
reviews.text: Way too expensive. Have had much cheaper and just as nice in smaller hotels. The food was VERY average.

reviews.title: Other then location. Nothing special about hotel,
reviews.text: Need to be rebuilt.
reviews.positives: nothing special I can think off, except the staffs at the door are trying hard to get our need.

reviews.title: good location and nice hotel
reviews.text:
stay for 1 night. hotel is located very close to shopping belt and nice restaurant. 

Can spend time shopping nearby the hotel. Service is pretty good. the room is neat and tidy and bed is comfortable. 

Breakfast is good and great variety. 

considering the hotel charges in Hanoi, Hilton rate is still value for money.
reviews.positives: Room is big and clean. Bed is very comfortable. Breakfast is good.

reviews.title: Historic old hotel
reviews.text: this hotel has an incredible history. it has seen many changes in hanoi and a very diverse group of people have stayed here. my stay was pleasant enough. stayed on an executive floor. staff in the lounge were very accommodating and attentive. i used the business center and it was efficient. the hotel is getting dated. rooms were average quality. public areas were also average. perhaps time for some investment?
reviews.positives: Centrally located and all the taxi drivers know where it is.

reviews.title: Too old
reviews.text: Breakfast is so so, decoration is too old and room’s things is very limited.

reviews.title: pretty well, I'll choose this hotel next time.
reviews.text: pretty well, I'll choose this hotel next time.

reviews.title: valuable
reviews.text: An old hotel but breakfast is very good

reviews.text: service is relatively poor, they even refuse to take the feedbacks, the worst Hilton I have ever been

reviews.title: it was pleasing, room was good but not great
reviews.text: not so satisfy, wifi was low on signal, got extra- charged on the hotel fee coz it doesn't shown when booked. the staff is fairly good.

reviews.title: Classic hotel
reviews.text: the location is convenience.  and the room is very spacious and the housekeeping put a wooden dragonfly on our bed every night.  the breakfast is good, especially the vietnamese noodle.

reviews.title: Bad experience of AC not effective, bathroom drain plugging in at the hotel.
reviews.text: Hotel appears old and not well maintained being 5 star property.

reviews.title: Not a very impressive stay
reviews.text:
I was there for 3 nights stay. This is my second stay in this hotel. 

The bedsheet and pillow cases smelled terrible,  it was though they were not change after the last guests left.  I hope the hotel will do a more thorough job when it comes to changing the bedsheets and cleaning up the room.

reviews.title: 3 star hotel at BEST
reviews.text:
How on earth did hotel get its 3 star rating?
The room looked dingy and old 
The bar fridge didn’t keep anything cold.
The mattress was caved in the centre.
The furniture was far to old.
Would’ve been better of staying at 3 star hotel and saved my money.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Clean spacious but expensive

reviews.title: located is nice. breakfast is poor. additional facilities aren't good...
reviews.text: If I go to Vietnam again, I consider that I stay there or not. Of course that place is located central so it is easy to walk tour anywhere. but when just using the sleeping, it is not attractive. Breakfast is so poor that I went out to eat Vietnam noodle that tastes much better than $15.

reviews.title: Nice location
reviews.text: Nice location, easy to access to many interesting places in Hanoi. Cleanliness is good, however, the staffs were so not helpful.

reviews.title: Wonderful service
reviews.text: The Hilton is about 15 years old and looks a little bit tired. The pool is nothing to get excited about. And I didn't find the location that great. (Apart from going to the Opera House). But I'd still recommend this hotel because the staff were absolutely wonderful. Especially the manager of the cafe who made sure we could pack our breakfast from the buffet at 6am to sustain us for the trip to Halong Bay.

reviews.title: not value for money
reviews.text: no breakfast and no wifi access , room renovation nothing special

reviews.title: Just the name!
reviews.text: Not as good as expected. Wifi was an issue!

reviews.title: Artsy; classic but spacious
reviews.text:
Staying in this hotel reminds me of the classics; where hotels are built to be majestic. The hotel is already many years old; so do not expect that modern feel. However, I like that majestic feel and that while its conditions may not be appealing, I still enjoyed my stay.

Location is fantastic, not so for tourists but maybe for businesses. 

Great customer service as expected of Hilton nevertheless.

reviews.title: Good location

reviews.title: Beautiful architecture,attentive staff,decent room
reviews.positives: Lobby entertainment, Lobby ambiance, front desk service

reviews.title: No Surprise for stay
reviews.text: If not for the promotional discount, i won't choose this hotel. If u expect much from the stay, then maybe u will be disappointed. For my stay in other hotels, usually they have some fruits or sweets reserved for the guests, but not for this one. The room is quite large and comfortable, but for the service it is fair only.
reviews.positives: large room, good discount & fitness facilities

reviews.title: clearly a faded 5 star hotel
reviews.text:
The first negative impression was the foul smell of the carpeted floor in the corridors and room.
Hotel maintenance is clearly not up to par for a 5 star hotel. The hotel is not well appointed to be classified as a 5 star hotel.There was even no free wifi in the room !!!
reviews.positives: location, friendly staff and room space

reviews.title: Good location, acceptable room condition.
reviews.positives: Room size, location of hotel and value for money.

reviews.title: Average Hotel

reviews.title: Good tourist hotel
reviews.text:
We stayed at the Hilton for just one night after coming back from Halong Bay.  The staff were very helpful indeed when we arrived.
There was a concern about delayed flights out of Hanoi and the tour desk were very knowledgeable.  Breakfast was good, although not the best I have had.  Level of service was terrific.

reviews.title: Hilton Hanoi Opera Hotel,
reviews.text: The hotel was ok but I wasn't blown away, mostly because there are othe cheaper options nearby that are just as good if not nicer, depending on your tastes. But ok, no big complaints.
reviews.positives: Good location, comfy beds, big rooms, nice breakfast

reviews.title: Comfortable room but a little old. Time to upgrade?
reviews.text: location is at the French quarters, right next to the Opera which is convenient since we were watching a play there, and there are a few food outlets nearby for meals outside the hotel. Staff speaks english and were courteous and friendly. Room was a nice size and quite comfortable. The small nagging problem we had was the electrical outlets were a little loose. We had problem charging our phones and blowing our hair.

reviews.title: Very good

The in room dining Beef Pho was amazing!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Believe it or not: you need to pay extra for the WIFI!!  Like the friendly staff said: „accordingly to the Hilton policy“. Alternatively: „you sign up for a membership.“ Last time I ever will book a Hilton hotel. Best regards

reviews.title: Decent hotel but dated
reviews.text: Hotel is in a great location with solid staff, but facilities (particularly the rooms) are quite dated. Definitely not a bad option if location is the most important factor.

reviews.title: descent stay
reviews.text: Quite close to city center, breakfast good but not unmemorable, no free Wi-Fi in the rooms, polite staff
reviews.positives: great lobby, good bathroom, clean room

reviews.title: A short 12-hour stay but a rather awesome one!
reviews.text: Not bad.
reviews.positives: The room, location and friendliness of staff

reviews.title: Hanoi Opera Hilton - a lot of room for improvement
reviews.text:
No 5 star hotel should charge guests separately for Wi-Fi. After coming from Japan and South Korea, where no hotels charged for the internet use, it was a big disappointment to find out that Hanoi Hilton has a different policy. And the receptionist looked too oblivious and not interested.
The rooms were sanitary clean but at the same time too empty and boring. The management should invest some serious effort to give this hotel more character, given its location. Only the entrance hall looks interesting, but the rooms are a big disappointment. Also, the smell of the carpets is not acceptable at 5 star level. I have been to Hilton hotels where local character was clearly present and used, and I don't understand why this is not done in the centre of Hanoi.

reviews.title: Typical Hilton Hotel
reviews.text: Got the business floor package when checked in. Good for the first night after travelling all day. Had the drink and nibbles for dinner. A little bit away from the downtown area. A bit of a walk to the lake but not to bad
reviews.positives: Business orientated, Clean enough, Good business floor package

reviews.title: good location but not happy with the facility
reviews.text:
The room was spacious and comfy but there is no wifi in the room (only down at the lobby)
It's not convenient especially for business travellers who need to access emails via phone or iPad

reviews.title: Generally good & confortable.
reviews.text: My 1st time stay at this hotel as recommended by my local partner for its location for easy pick-up to proceed for the daily business meetings.

reviews.title: Convenient location, very clean, nice hotel
reviews.positives: The location, The staff and the interior

reviews.title: Old Hotel and not worth the money
reviews.text: This hotel needs renovation. The rooms need more light.

reviews.title: Historical Hotel with great location
reviews.text: my stayed was brief but because hotel location was located in the old city center, i managed to get a lot done in short time by not having too much time spent in traffic.

reviews.title: One night in Hanoi
reviews.text: although we only had one night in the hilton hanoi opera hotel for a special occasion, it did not live up to the normal "hilton" expectations. we were a little disappointed -- small things, but important, e.g. no bell boy, we had to ask someone to take care (carry) of our luggage. we stayed at other hotels (4/5 star) on this particular trip and they were all somewhat better than the hilton. i will always choose the hilton because of its world-wide reputation, but this time hanoi opera was a bit disappointing.

reviews.title: Interior is too old. Need the renovation as soonest
reviews.text: The location is good, surrounding are beautifull but the interior is too old. The hotel need to be renovation as soonest

reviews.title: Average business hotel
reviews.text: Good location and decent rooms but breakfast menu was the same every single day and very slow service at the reception, check-in, check-out. Would not stay for personal holiday but great place for business travel.

reviews.title: good location
reviews.text: The in room breakfast is good

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Hilton standards,  located next to Hanoi Opera house, which is walking distance to Old Quarter and Hoan Kiem.  Popular Binh Minh jazz club just stone throw away.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Was good

reviews.title: No comment
reviews.text: No comment

reviews.title: Not bad but not great either
reviews.text: The exterior of the hotel is grand and very well located. However when we got to the rooms, we were surprised by the old carpeting and furniture, and lack of amenities. On the positive side, the room was spacious, clean and well kept. The hotel staff were generally helpful, however, they seemed more interested in the tips than to actually assist. One experience behind this statement is that they lied about being able to get a SIM card on the streets in order to assist you so you can tip them. So just keep that in mind if you were to stay here. Not a bad hotel, but not great either.

reviews.title: A quick trip to Hanoi
reviews.text: Excellent service but it would be good if there is a spa at the hotel. The rooms are a bit dated but overall because of the service it makes it OK. Very attentive front desk staff and bellboys are very pleasant and helpful.
reviews.positives: Staff (service) above all but also location

reviews.title: A good stay but a tired hotel
reviews.text: Checked in and the room that I was given smelt horribly damp so changed rooms. On the last day of stay there was a mix-up in breakfast asked for coffee and it never arrived and then I was given tea and not coffee. A real mix-up at check out reception did not have a record of my mini bar consumption and then tried to double charge me for a tube of Pringles chips. Taxi to the airport was a manic driver, sometimes fast sometimes slow and when he stopped he could not make up his mind where to park his taxi. Plus, he dropped us off at the wrong domestic terminal and kept part of the change for the taxi fare.

reviews.title: good location with old world charm
reviews.text: check out the cool jazz joint nearby.

reviews.title: Nice and Clean Hotel
reviews.text: will choose next time

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.text: Excellent
reviews.positives: very friendly staff, excellent location and good rooms

reviews.title: Centrally located hotel with good value for money
reviews.text: Hilton was centrally located and the staffs were very helpful and attentive with our needs. The hotel itself is only walking distance to both local and international dining places.

reviews.title: central location, friendly staff, value for money
reviews.positives: central location, friendly staff and value for money

reviews.title: Good hotel group. Good value.
reviews.text: It was a pleasant journey. I felt welcome on arrival. This hotel is located in the best part of Hanoi: that's its great plus.
reviews.positives: The main thing is the location.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel in Great Location
reviews.text:
my first time staying in Hilton, clean , location is great, 
food in the Italian resturant is nice.
everything works , staff couteous.

reviews.title: Lovely hotel located on the lake
reviews.text: Nice hotel.  very kind staff.  rooms are well maintained.
reviews.positives: quiet location and near to the history

reviews.title: Very well located hotel
reviews.text:
It was my first night in Hanoi and the hotel is very nice.
The bedroom was simple but comfortable.
The hotel has a huge lobby and is near the opera and the old quarter.
reviews.positives: Good location, good food, good service

reviews.title: Nice upmarket hotel
reviews.text: the hilton hanoi opera hotel was luxurious and spacious. it had great features and amenities. the room on the club floor was very nice and the offerings in the club lounge highly commendable. the staff i encountered were all very polite and friendly. i also liked the good location and proximity to lake hoan kiem and the downtown shopping areas. there were also many places to eat and to do things nearby. i enjoyed my stay and would certainly return to stay again.

reviews.title: Grand hotel in good location
reviews.text:
I liked the bathroom which looks newer than the room. Bathroom comes with Crabtree & Evelyn toiletries which is my favourite :-)
Room is big but the deco is a bit dated.
Hotel & resto staff are courteous and polite.
I had only dined at the Vietnamese resto for breakfast & once for dinner. Food is good with wide selection for b/fast
reviews.positives: Big room, Nice bathroom with Crabtree & Evelyn toiletries , nice location

reviews.title: So so
reviews.text: Wifi is not free. Couldn't connect wifi well.

reviews.title: Quiet hotel, lovely staff, bit dated.
reviews.text: We stayed here in the lead up to Tet and it was a very quiet hotel. Spacious rooms and extremely comfortable bed. A bit dated but tastefully decorated.  It's in a quieter location if you want to get out of the busy ness of the Old Quarter yet a reasonable walking distance around the lake to any action. If you say the Hilton is located at the bottom of Hoan Kiem Lake the busy parts are at the area to the top and then towards the left. Primary suggestions  - The in room facilities could be easily improved by moving the tea/coffee facilities to another location (current place is very cramped) and making the power points more accessible. The pool area is dated but the pool is a good size. It was too cold to swim when we were there unfortunately.

reviews.title: Nice & Clean hotel
reviews.text: easy to access city center

reviews.title: Luxury but old-fashioned hotel
reviews.text: The stay was pleasant and the room large but the decor and the furniture are old-fashioned. The hotel needs and upgrading.

reviews.title: Good hotel in Hanoi.
reviews.text: Generally is satisfied.
reviews.positives: Helpful staff, clean room, good breakfast.

reviews.title: GIVING A History model in all place in hotel . roo

reviews.title: Nice hotel at good location
reviews.text: It was a short stay but was happy that we received a personal note and fresh fruits & flowers upon check in. However, I was very dissapointed that the birthday cake for my husband that I had requested via email was not sent to our room. I had requested and sent a reminder for it and received confirmation before our trip thus was sad that it was not being followed up. Otherwise, a nice stay.
reviews.positives: Location, value for money, fresh fruits & flowers upon check in

reviews.positives: The hotel location and helpful staff

reviews.title: Friendly staff and good location
reviews.text: Relatively comfortable stay and very quiet they gotta improve on their sports bar
reviews.positives: It's got very nice restaurant nearby and seems to be central to all my client

reviews.title: Great location near Opera House
reviews.text: Great location. I would recommend to stay at this hotel.

reviews.title: Nice grand colonial style hotel with great service
reviews.text: Nice grand hotel. Not much stuffs to see in the immediate vicinity except the Opera House. Plenty high end boutiques nearby but i would rather shop for these stuffs in other Asian cities. Great service and currency exchange service is provided.
reviews.positives: Close to Hoan Kiem Lake and its surrounding attractions like shops and night market

reviews.title: centrally located 5-star hotel
reviews.text: my 2-day stay was short but interesting as it is easily accessible to both the high-end boutiques as well as the deepl-rooted traditional shops within walking distance. How the new and old can stride side by side is the beauty of Hanoi. The hotel is clean and relatively comfortable for a tired body after a while day walk. The staff are generally helpful and provide the necessary info when needed. Even the housekeeping staff soeak English and portray a professional approach to customer service. we are impressed. will i come back to stay in the same hotel again? Yes. i definitely will.
reviews.positives: centrally located wuthin walking distance of old quarter is definitely a plus. The nearby lake is laced with historical sites and lots of local coffee shops. Definitely a must visit for tourists

reviews.title: great location
reviews.text: Great

reviews.title: 5 stars hotel located in the central
reviews.text: It's located in the central of Hanoi. Easy to explore the city. but the price is a little higher than the quality. I think the price is not match the level. but it is still a not bad hotel to live
reviews.positives: good location, clean room, friendly staff

reviews.title: It's a comfortable stay
reviews.text: It's not a fancy hotel, but i would consider it a very comfortable stay in Hilton. The room is clean (I have a high requirement for hygiene). It seems that the staff came to do the housekeeping twice a day (not sure). Always do the refill. It's not right next to the Lake but i think it just takes 10 minutes to talk there and along the way you can shop a bit. Next to the hotel is the Opera House (If i didnt get it wrong). I dont think it's really cheap to stay here as the breakfast is not included (but there are some nice restaurants nearby). But If i need to pick again between the boutique hotels that cost around the same price as Hilton, I will choose Hilton again. If i can spend even more, may go for the Sofitel Metropole.

reviews.title: Luxury and leisure
reviews.text:
Everything is good except for the bed type is not as booked or confirmed. 
Nice staffs and very clean service
reviews.positives: Big room, nice decor, covenient location

reviews.title: Efficient service, nice location
reviews.text: Overall was pleasant and with positive experience.

reviews.title: Nice central 5star location
reviews.text: The hilton hanoi is centrally located, nicely close to the Hoan Kiem lake. for both business as leisure travellers its a great hotel  to stay at. the breakfast area is very nice, fully equipped spa, sport, swimmingpool. a great location to stay in hanoi.

reviews.title: Great Location
reviews.text: The location is great. Friendly services, good food
reviews.positives: Friendly, clean, nice view and good food

reviews.title: Good location, helpful staff
reviews.text: If it is your first time to Hanoi and your plan is to spend only a day or two for city sights and then off to Halong Bay , the central location of this Hotel makes it an ideal choice for couples. Room is big and clean and front office service level meets the international standards of this hotel chain. My only disappointment was that the TV was pretty small on my return stay, while on my arrival night the room had big flat screen TV.
reviews.positives: Centrally located and within walking distance to most city attractions and restaurants

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Staff was very helpful and professional. I forget my important documents in safe but hotel Manager Ms. DUONG HONG DIEP sent to airport. Thanks.

reviews.title: Not all the facilities open yet
reviews.text: Great location and helpful staff, but it is still far from open after the covid . So we had to go out for drinks and a meal . Super discounted prices at the moment . Breakfast was nice and the pool  to ourselves was good . Some areas need a bit if cleaning after the long shutdown ( pool could do with a good scrub

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: very comfortable. walking distance has many shops & restaurants. staff very friendly. nice room with crabtree & evelyn toiletries provided

reviews.title: Hilton Hanoi Opera
reviews.text: Thanks to covid the rates were significantly discounted which made for good value.

reviews.title: Review On Hilton Hanoi Opera
reviews.text: Location was pretty good especially and all was fine for us. Thanks.

reviews.title: Great Location
reviews.text: We stayed for its location. Staff is nice. Bed is very comfortable. Will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Old hotel but walking distance to tourist attraction. No nearby mall this was important for me.

reviews.title: all are ok
reviews.text: good service full facilities

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Need to inprove service

reviews.title: It was good
reviews.text: The hotel was spacious and quiet in Hanoi.

reviews.title: Will definitely come back!
reviews.text: Nice hotel with good location! Spacious room and excellent service! I'll definitely come back again!

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.text: Great location and great hotel.

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text: Good value for money. Rooms are rather old though. Can find food near by but if you want to head over to the lake, you will have to brave the traffic. Can find a lot of local coffee joints around. Very central

reviews.title: Repeat Visitor
reviews.text: Great location.  My preferred place to stay in Hanoi.

reviews.title: great location
reviews.text: Really enjoyed our stay, staff was very helpful and one of the better parts of the hotel.  Rooms somewhat dated, but very clean.  Was there during new years eve, very convenient to many celebrations around town.

reviews.title: A PLEASANT STAY AT THE HILTON
reviews.text: THIS HOTEL IS INDEED A 5 STAR HOTEL. THE FOYER IS BEAUTIFUL. THE ROOMS ARE VERY SPACIOUS AND COMFORTABLE. ALL STAFF WERE VERY FRIENDLY AND EXTREMELY HELPFUL. THE BREAKFAST WAS BEAUTIFUL AND RELAXING BY THE POOL WAS FANTASTIC. THE CHECK-IN EXPERIENCE FOR THE EXECUTIVE ROOM WAS WELL RECEIVED AND THE LOUNGE WAS VERY WELL CATERED FOR.ON DEPARTURE A TAXI WAS ORGANISED AND THE DRIVERS DETAILS WERE NOTED BY THE STAFF, SO IF THERE WAS A PROBLEM, ALL I HAD TO DO WAS TO CONTACT THE HOTEL. I THOUGHT THIS WAS A GREAT TOUCH. I WOULD NOT HAVE A PROBLEM RECOMMENDING THIS HOTEL TO ANYBODY AND WOULD DEFINATELY STAY HERE AGAIN IN THE FUTURE.
reviews.positives: CLEANLINESS AND ATTENTION TO DETAIL, VALUE FOR MONEY, STAFF PERFORMANCE

reviews.title: Near downtown
reviews.positives: Big room, near downtown, friendly staffs

reviews.title: Quite good
reviews.text: Good enough

reviews.title: Luxury at a good price & location.
reviews.text: Great!

reviews.text: see my other comments on the service level of this hotel

Very enjoyed. The swimming pool is small but clean
Checkin n checkout is flexible 
Staffs are helpful
reviews.positives: Nice location, good service, friendly staff

reviews.title: Have a great time
reviews.text: Service is great.  Hotel is a little old but well maintained.
reviews.positives: Centrally located, clean, within walking distance to many attraction around

reviews.title: Great staff and service
reviews.text: Was great to stay here, although maybe i would possibly stay in a different part of town next time. The room Decor was a little dated but very clean and comfortable. I would recommend this hotel but feel it maybe a 4 or 4.5 star hotel.
reviews.positives: Had a fantastic pool, Conceierge staff helpful. Lobby was good for drinks and snacks with French pastries!

reviews.title: Clean hotel with warm service
reviews.text: I lived at a standard room.  The facilities are not exactly new, but it was well maintained and clean.  I had a city view across my window. International breakfast with sufficient choice. Housekeeping staff are very nice and kind.
reviews.positives: Welcoming and helpful staff.  They pointed me towards dining options nearby.

reviews.title: Good hotel for business traveler
reviews.text: The hotel is in a good and convenient location, both for business purposes and some tourist attractions in the downtown area. There are many good restaurants in easy walk distance to the hotel. The hotel lounge is a nice sports bar. Internet is not for free, which is a downside for any business traveler.

reviews.title: nice and friendly staff
reviews.text: laundry service was not as good as expected, but staff are nice and friendly.  loved aroma pot placed staff placed in my roon upon request.

reviews.title: good business hotel
reviews.text: Stay was good, Used their driver to take me to meetings, worked out well for me.
reviews.positives: breakfast was very nice, gym is very good

reviews.title: Very old hotel
reviews.text: Facilities need to be upgraded and rooms revamped. For the price it is not so good value for money. Although it is walking distance to some of the famous sites and shopping district.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Good price at the current season

reviews.title: Nice Hotel
reviews.text: We stayed here for 1 week and it was a nice and clean hotel. Unfortunately we have some doubts about the safety of their Wifi or internet connection.

reviews.title: Mr
reviews.text: Smell at rooms wasn't so nice (humidity)

reviews.title: Nice relaxing atmosphere
reviews.text: Highly recommended

reviews.title: good to travel hanoi.
reviews.text: place where hilton is good to travel at hanoi. famous place is not so far from hilton. except ho chi min place most of place is working distance.

reviews.title: Much better  than the other "Hanoi Hilton"
reviews.text: Very central hotel. The pool was disappointingly small. Rooms were nice sized and service was good. But there are so many nice hotels in Hanoi and sadly there is nothing special about the Hanoi Opera Hilton.

reviews.title: Old facilities but good service
reviews.text:
A little bit disapointed upon check in when facilities are normal and not so new
However, the service is really good
- staff is friendly and helpful
- quiet
- great location
- good complimentary finger food
I think its quite value for money

reviews.title: Reasonable
reviews.text:
Hilton never charmed to me at the first visit, but with this budget, they try hard to do the best for you. 

We didn't reserve the meeting room, they are so kind to us to offer the other room for the whole afternoon meetings.
reviews.room_type: Hilton Executive Double Room with Access to Executive Lounge

reviews.title: Hanoi Hilton holiday
reviews.text:
More food options in restaurants would have been good. All restaurants used the same menu.
Location was convenient and walking distance to the lake and old quarter

reviews.title: Very good all round.
reviews.text: This hotel is very well located for visiting the older parts of Hanoi. The facilities in the hotel are clean and modern and the staff efficient and friendly. I got what I thought was a very good deal on my room and the buffet breakfast was excellent (though there are very nice coffee shops, bakeries and pho outlets close by).

reviews.title: Great place with an old world charm
reviews.text: Standard room was huge. Staff were very friendly and spoke good English. Made you feel at home. Was only here for a night and was too tired to explore but there are restaurants and some upscale shops located within walking distance. About 30 minutes from the airport. All in all, it was a good choice.

reviews.title: Great rustic place to stay
reviews.text: Very nice place but not as modern. But still great

reviews.title: Best Location in Hanoi
reviews.text: The room was clean with a nice view of the opera house.  You had to pay for wifi unless you were a member of the Hilton Club.  400k VND per day for fast  wifi and 300k VND per day for slow wifi.  The Hilton Bakery was excellent and the staff were super friendly.  Just around the corner from Starbucks, the Jazz Club, and a couple of nice parks.  We got the bargain price for the room which did not include the breakfast.  But the coffee in the lounge was excellent.  Excellent location.  Taxi is 360k VND for the airport.  ($15 USD)

reviews.title: Hanoi Hilton
reviews.text: Great

reviews.title: Great Hotel, Excellent Staff
reviews.text: Wonderful. Should have stay there again after our trip to Halong Bay.
reviews.positives: History, Location and Staff. Good Price for a 5 Star Hotel

reviews.title: Not advisable to stay in this hotel during summer.
reviews.text: generally good, but under power air-condition has affected the hotel.
reviews.positives: Location, big room and swimming pool.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: The stay was good. It is accessible and around the centre of the headquarters.
reviews.positives: great room, nice pool, good service

reviews.title: Luxery hotel near the heart of Hanoi
reviews.text: This is a beautiful hotel.  The staff is excellent-kind and helpful in every way. The pool provided great relaxation. The room was large and comfortable. Two issues: the rooms do not have wi fi (but the lobby does), and the restaurant and mini bar prices are obscenely high, especially in a relatively inexpensive city like Hanoi. If you are wiling to spend this kind of money for a hotel, I recommend you search different options to get your money's worth.
reviews.positives: Beautifully designed hotel, with a nice pool and excellent customer service.

reviews.title: Well located hotel with good service
reviews.text: we stayed 2 nights here and opted for an executive room with access to the executive lounge. good room size. hotel is rather old but decently maintained and rooms are clean. the executive lounge serves decent wines/alcohol but the snacks could improve in terms of variety and quality.
reviews.positives: Good location, executive rooms of a comfortable size

reviews.title: Beautiful Hotel!
reviews.text: hilton hanoi is great for it's top service. we were staying in the old quarter and was unpleased with our hotel so decided to spoil ourself and switch to one of the best hotels in hanoi. managed to book a room close to midnight via agoda and wrote to the hotel to say pls can we have an eraly check in the next day if available. when we turned up at 9am the next morning, we were greeted by  diep, who looks after the front desk. she was just great! she got my email and was working feverishly to get us into a room even though we saw that the hotel wa very full with a convention going on. she managed to get us a room and checked us in quickly - how lovely that was after the stay at our previous hotel! loved the hilton at hanoi!

reviews.title: 5 star
reviews.text:
needs wifi very close to all the city places

very goos staff loved the pool area and very good gym area

the hotel is very well set out and so clean and looks brand new

the streets around the hotel have very cheap food and drinks

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and great service big rooms
reviews.text: Lovely staff and big rooms.  everything is perfekt.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: The staffs there are helpful and knowledgeable. Cleanliness is good and the breakfast is delicious too. Given to the location & amenities, it is value for money.

reviews.title: Worth the money!
reviews.text: Many thanks Hilton Opera all staffs for my comfort stay. Breakfast is wonderful. Nice front desk especially  Miss Linh  who is always welcome to help. As well, thanks to Concierge for all info I asked and should know and Housekeeping people for daily neat and clean room. If I have a chance to be back to Hanoi, Hilton will be definitely the 1st choice for my stay!

reviews.title: Very good!
reviews.text:
Very clean and good service. Super comfortable bed.
Complete gym with jacuzzi and sauna in the locker room.
The breakfast was good but not included on the price.
Location is good, it’s a walking distance to the old quarter.
The only bad thing was the wifi that didn’t work good enough.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.text: Great location. Big rooms for family of 4. They included an extra bed at no additional charge. King size bed very comfortable. Nice sports bar which the kids enjoyed. Pool much smaller than in pictures but it rained the whole time, July, so we didn’t use anyway. Gym was good. Enoughmachines even at busy times. Buffet breakfast really nice!

reviews.title: Nice Stay
reviews.text:
We had a great Stay at Hilton Opera. 
Very helpful staff, great location in walking distance to the old town. 
Spacious rooms, clean and silently. Would be nice with a proper door to the bathroom.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel in a great location.
reviews.text: This is right in the French Quarter and provides a quiet haven after the madness in Hanoi. Everything is as you would expect at a Hilton with beautifully comfortable air conditioned rooms and a grand entrance. It is a great location to explore the French and Old quarters. You will find plenty of cheaper hotels in Hanoi but it depends what you are looking for. For us we felt very safe here.

reviews.title: NYE in Hanoi
reviews.text: Pool was not heated however service otherwise was excellent.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: It's good
reviews.text: Good Survice
reviews.room_type: Hilton Executive Double Room with Access to Executive Lounge

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Staff is friendly, close to old quarter (10 to 15 minutes walk), staff is very friendly, their MAGIC service is awesome. they'll try their best to help you and the respond is immediate. Basicall you can ask any of the staff and they'll help you. The room is big but quite old. This is best hotel so far i have ever stayed (way better than hotel in singapore)
reviews.room_type: Hilton Executive Twin Room with Access to Executive Lounge

reviews.title: Great rustic place to stay
reviews.text: Very nice place but not as modern. But still great

reviews.title: Excellent location near the old quarter, swimming pool, spacious rooms
reviews.text: Always a good choice in Hanoi, can recommend it and will come back myself.

reviews.title: Hellpfull Staff
reviews.positives: Hotel Staff is very helfull, he recommnede us best place for eat and he help us to showed where did to but mineral water at night.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.text: Great location & friendly staff and the price is lot cheaper than other 5 stars hotel in Hanoi. It's an old hotel & furnishing & furniture looks quite old. But the room is very clean & comfortable.  Foods are not bad but a bit pricey (expected for a 5 star hotel)

reviews.title: lovely stay
reviews.text: Had a pleasant stay with Hilton Hanoi Opera/staffs were very helpful and hotel is located in a very convenience location.

reviews.title: Great business hotel - and value for money
reviews.text: Overall a very good experience. On departure date they even had a small breakfast opening in the lobby area (although they only too late informed us that they had actually opened for full breakfast that day in the restaurant upstairs).
reviews.positives: Very nice rooms, excellent food, and pleasant staff

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Stayed in standard smoking room. Room was damn stinky with foot smell. I think reception boy pushed me into this junk box 'cause i declined his recommendation to upgrade to suite. Breakfast and internet were not free for standard room user. Room service was very nice though. My kids (stayed in another room) were happy to play in swimming pool in the night.

reviews.title: Hilton is always a guarantee of quality
reviews.text:
Prices are higher than average, but, after all, however it's Hilton. Which is exlusive-class hotel.
Hilton Hanoi Opera is going to be my choice for the next business trip to.
strangest thing was to see how badly Airport Taxi knew the location of the Hilton. Hilton is centrally located and the renowned opera on the side. Fortunately, I have been living for several years in Vietnam, and I am able to discuss the local language passably well, so taxien detour attempt was unsuccessful.
reviews.positives: Good location, comfortable and service-minded staff

reviews.title: Fantastic service on all aspects of our stay
reviews.text:
This hotel knows what customer service is and goes above and beyond.. On arrival we were asked if we wanted to upgrade our stay for $50 a night.. Better room, free wi fi, breakfast for two, club lounge including afternoon tea, free coffee and soft drinks all day, 2 hrs of wine/beer and finger food each night for two.. We accepted and it was fantastic.. Breakfast was wonderful the best in Vietnam.. 

We didn't need dinner or lunch as the breakfast then club Lounge keep us so so full and was all of such high quality.. The pool area isn't that great but this is a hotel not a resort so it is fine.. 

Highly recommend this hotel

reviews.title: Stunning hotel
reviews.text:
Wonderful hotel 
Very nice rooms 
Sports bar fun to hang out in

reviews.title: Loved it-good location, big rooms, great breakfast
reviews.text: We got breakfast included and it was fantastic.  The hotel is located in the French Quarter which is really a fascinating part of the city.  We were within walking distance to a lot of places of interest. I recommend this hotel.
reviews.positives: good location, big rooms, great breakfast

reviews.title: Lovely hotel and service with a smile.
reviews.text: Hilton Hanoi Opera Hotel is located next to the Opera House.  There are great restaurants in walking distance as well as wonderful shopping close by.  We ate two meals at the hotel.  They were good and just what we expected.  The bed was comfortable and the bathroom was a nice size.  A local English paper was available in the morning.  The fresh rose was a nice touch.
reviews.positives: The location is great and the staff is efficent

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Centrally located, very helpful staff especially the concirege Mr Som.
Who though had a day off on a sunday answerd all my queries immediatly .Lavish Breakfast spread .

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great size rooms, excellent gym & pool, delicious breakfast!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Lovely hotel as I remember it more than 10 years ago!!, very helpful staff...
Not to mention my name, thanks.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Position is great! It is in center of Hanoi, near Hoan Kiem lake, feel comfortably to walk around.

reviews.title: Majestic colonial building
reviews.text: Great location next to the opera house, grand old building, the usual Hilton standards fro staff, cleanliness and service. Very comfortable.

reviews.title: Impressed
reviews.text: Staff wre e very attentive & helpfuk, thank you. Perfect to stay outside the panic of the old quarter. Loved the opera / french area. Walking was easy (until in the thick of the city). Saturday nights are lots of fun, streets closed off, kids playing games (adults also). Loved our stay in Hanoi

reviews.title: Peffect
reviews.text: Great first night, all went to plan.

reviews.title: The BEST hotel in Hanoi.
reviews.text: Yes. This is not a cheap hotel. However, if you want quite and relax vacation in Hanoi, since Hanoi is not an expensive city to travel, spending some extra for good accomodation would not be a bad choice. If you can have a discount, it will be better.

reviews.title: Very good location in Hanoi
reviews.text: Very good location in Hanoi. The service is very good and value for money.

reviews.title: Best choice in Hanoi!
reviews.text: Best of the best in Hanoi! Town Centre and nice facilities!  I love the buffet breakfast a lot!

reviews.title: Very good service and location
reviews.text: Well my friend very happy

reviews.title: Centrally Located within walking distance of Old Quarter
reviews.text: Breakfast buffet can be improved with a wider selection and perhaps changes should also be made to the fare. can't have the same stuff everyday

reviews.title: Dutton family.
reviews.text: The location of the hotel was perfect, the facilities clean and comfortable, and the staff friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Awesome stay !
reviews.text: Met our expectations.

reviews.title: Amazing location, fantastic hotel
reviews.text: Amazing location to explore the old quarter. Very friendly staff. The Cafe sells very tasty cakes, croissants and danish. Great hotel. Nice pool area. We will definitely come back.

reviews.title: Hilton Hanoi Opera
reviews.text: It was very comfortable. The staff were friendly. Communication, though, was quite a challenge

reviews.title: Love the Happy Hour
reviews.text: Would recommend the hotel great location and very friendly staff.
reviews.positives: Great Food, Staff - Would Stay Again

reviews.title: I will stay here again ............
reviews.text: We had a great experience staying at this hotel. Thank you !!!
reviews.positives: Location is good, good price and good staff

reviews.title: Great building and location
reviews.text: Hotel is very centralized, next to the hanoi opera house. Lobby is huge and spacious, room is also comfortable and clean. Breakfast selection is good, internet and wifi connection was stable. Overall a good value hotel for business travellers.
reviews.positives: Location, being next to the opera house, service

reviews.title: Business Travel
reviews.text: Good, no problems, will stay there again next time I am in Hanoi
reviews.positives: Central location, many suitable areas for meetings, good dining options
